message:
Security hardening: constant-time auth and deterministic checkpoint ordering

auth.ts:
- Add safeCompare() using crypto.timingSafeEqual for admin key validation
- Prevents timing attacks that could leak admin key through response times
- Pads shorter buffer to match length before comparison to avoid length leak
- Replace direct === comparison with constant-time comparison

checkpoint.ts:
- Change getLatestCheckpoint ordering from (id DESC) to (createdAt DESC, rowid DESC)
- Previous ordering by id could give inconsistent results if UUIDs were used
- createdAt provides semantic correctness (most recent by time)
- rowid as tiebreaker ensures deterministic ordering for same-timestamp rows

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -614,7 +614,7 @@ export async function getLatestCheckpoint(
     .select()
     .from(checkpointsTable)
     .where(eq(checkpointsTable.agentId, agentId))
-    .orderBy(desc(checkpointsTable.id))
+    .orderBy(desc(checkpointsTable.createdAt), desc(sql`rowid`))
     .limit(1);
 
   const row = result[0];
